HomeFor CompaniesFor TalentAboutBlogRequest Early Access
For Indian Startups & MSMEs

Find vetted fractional talent for international growth

Access experienced Indian diaspora sales leaders, BD operators, and partnership professionals — fractionally. No full-time commitment, no outsized hiring risk. Just structured commercial execution.

Apply as a company →See how matching works
The problem we solve

You need international commercial capacity. But a full-time hire is too risky, too slow, or too expensive.

Hiring risk
A full-time international sales hire at $150K–$250K with 6+ months to productivity is a bet most startups and MSMEs can’t afford to lose.
Network gap
You have a great product and some domestic traction. But you don’t have the relationships, market fluency, or channel access in target international markets.
Engagement friction
LinkedIn messages, warm introductions, and informal advisory calls don’t produce structured, accountable commercial execution.
Execution gap
You don’t just need advice — you need someone who can build pipeline, close deals, and activate partnerships in markets where you have no presence.
How matching works

From your first conversation to your first milestone.

01
Define what you need
Share your growth goals, target markets, and the commercial gap you need to fill. Our structured intake + AI diagnosis surfaces what you actually need — even gaps you didn’t describe.
AI-assisted intake
02
Get matched with vetted talent
AI generates a ranked shortlist with explainable rationale. Every match is reviewed by platform operators before you see it. Average time to first introduction: under 48 hours.
Operator-reviewed
03
Book a free consultation
30-minute intro calls are always free. Meet as many matches as you like. No commitment until you’re confident it’s the right fit.
Zero risk
04
Engage with confidence
A customised Scope of Work with clear deliverables, milestones, and pricing. We handle contracting, cross-border payments, and compliance — you focus on growth.
Managed delivery
What results to expect

Real outcomes from fractional commercial engagements.

Results vary by business stage, sales cycle, and ACV. Here's what our engagement models can deliver.

10–15
qualified meetings booked per month
From a fractional salesperson working 20 hours/week. Depends on your target buyer and market.
$250K+
net new revenue generated
Selling a $25K ACV product with a 2-month sales cycle. Actual results depend on your product-market fit.
80%
fractional leaders hired full-time
After a 6-month engagement. BridgeScale is fractional-first, but full-time conversion is supported.
< 48h
average time to first introduction
From completed intake to your first vetted talent introduction. Most matches happen within 24 hours.
Engagement types

Choose the structure that fits your business reality.

Consultation
Free first 30 min
One-time or short-series sessions. Strategy clarity, diagnosis, or a second opinion before committing to a longer engagement.
Sprint
From $2,500
Time-boxed, high-intensity fractional execution. A defined output — pipeline built, market entered, channel mapped — in a defined window (typically 30 days).
Retainer
$5,000–$10,000/mo
Ongoing fractional engagement. Regular cadence, sustained execution, and strategic continuity. 15–20 hours/week from an embedded commercial talent.
Success-fee
Outcome-based
Compensation tied to commercial results — deals closed, partnerships activated, revenue generated. Aligned incentives for both sides.
Hybrid
Cash + equity
For talent willing to share risk. A lower cash retainer combined with meaningful equity stake. Documented via FAST templates.
Full leadership
Custom
Senior fractional roles (VP Sales, CRO-type) with a longer arc — building teams, owning revenue, and operating as part of your leadership team.
Platform charges a 10% fee on all cash engagements — covering vetting, onboarding, contracting, payments, and compliance. No hidden fees.
🛡️
Satisfaction guaranteed. Rematch at no cost.
If a match doesn't work out, we'll connect you with a new professional from our network at no additional cost. We vet and stand by every professional on BridgeScale.

Ready to find your fractional commercial team?

Apply as a company — $200 one-time activation fee covers your full intake, diagnosis, and curated talent matching.

Fractional diaspora senior talent for India's startups & MSMEs.
